Hypoallergenic Salmon Recipe

Designed for doggos who are struggling with allergies and sensitive stomachs. For this recipe, we’ve excluded all common dog allergens and replaced them with hypoallergenic ingredients.

This recipe is high in protein and grain-free. Great for active dogs, picky eaters and dogs that are sensitive to grains.

A smarter and healthier way to care for your pet

START YOUR JOURNEY TODAY

Complete our short questionnaire about your dog.

CUSTOMIZE YOUR SUBSCRIPTION PLAN

Customize by choosing your dog's meal plan and how often you receive deliveries!

CONNECT WITH OUR PET HEALTH EXPERTS

By joining our community, pet owners like you are connected with Kabo's in-house pet health experts.

Build Your Box

How your subscription works

Tell us about your dog

Breed, age, size, activity level — all of that is important! We use this information to figure out exactly how much food your dog will need.

Start a profile

Select the diets for your dog to try

We'll show you a wide selection from gently cooked to shelf-stable dry dog food for you to choose from.

Order now

Make it a healthy routine

We’ll deliver your fresh dog food subscription on a flexible schedule. You can pause, cancel, or modify your dog’s meal plan at any time.

Get started

See the results of fresh dog food

We source high quality ingredients, carefully prepare the fresh dog food, and send it directly to you! The results are amazing.

More Energy

Healthier Weight

Our reviews are pawesome

Rated 4.9/5

Rated 4.9/5

“First of all, my dog LOVES Kabo. She is a very fussy eater but since we’ve started Kabo she licks her bowl clean. Also, we had an issue with one delivery and I contacted Kabo and within two days had another delivery. Excellent customer service! We highly recommend Kabo.”

Nancy — Ottawa

Just wanted to tell you that our pug loves her Kabo! She goes crazy when it’s breakfast and dinner time. Barking incessantly for her Kabo! The good news, she’s lost 3 lbs and looks so much healthier.

Sally — Vancouver

My boys love the food. Simply love it. But equally important is the customer service from the team is world class. Immediate attention and finding resolution.

Alfredo — Toronto

Our 10 month old Frenchie pup always waits till 10pm to eat her food - doesn't eat all day then eats at bedtime just because she realizes that's all that she is getting. We have been using Kabo toppers now for a few weeks and we mix it with her kibble and she eats everything! Licks her bowl clean. Her coat looks great. So happy we found Kabo!

Andy — Peterborough
